<?php namespace Spatie\FlareClient\Context; class ConsoleContextProvider implements ContextProvider { /** * @var array<string, mixed> */ protected array $arguments = []; /** * @param array<string, mixed> $arguments */ public function __construct(array $arguments = []) { $this->arguments = $arguments; } /** * @return array<int|string, mixed> */ public function toArray(): array { return [ 'arguments' => $this->arguments, ]; } }
